description: Cache hit ratio degraded, cascading to database+compute. The fix involves cache scaling AND warming logic. Both 'query_cache_optimization' (deep) and 'pool_sizing' (surface) framings are defensible.
action_category_rationale: cache_capacity_adjustment is the canonical cache-tier action (scaling nodes, capacity tuning). Cache warming and key redesign are secondary actions documented in specific_change prose but do not change the primary action category.
